symbols.name: IEntityPermissionEvaluator
symbols.summary: Interface for evaluating permissions on entities.

syntax.content: public interface IEntityPermissionEvaluator where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: HasPermissionAsync(ICurrentUserAccessor, TEntity, string, bool, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks if the user has the specified permission on the entity type.

syntax.content: Task HasPermissionAsync(ICurrentUserAccessor currentUserAccessor, TEntity entity, string permission, bool bypassCache = false, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

The entity to check permissions for.

Whether to bypass the cache.
